title: Plutarch, Moralia: Were the Athenians Famous in War or Wisdom?
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Were the Athenians Famous in War or Wisdom?.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Were the Athenians Famous in War or Wisdom?.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Were the Athenians Famous in War or Wisdom?': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
